flow_overview: A multi-entry Six Flags recruiting flow that lets applicants select a park, explore park-specific jobs, open a role detail page, and start an application.
capability_summary: Careers entry from general and park-specific pages
Park selection for location-scoped job discovery
Department and role browsing within a park
Detailed job information for specific openings

requirements.text: The system shall provide visible entry points into the careers experience from both general Six Flags pages and park-specific pages.
requirements.rationale: The sequence shows a general site, a jobs-focused page, and a White Water park page with hiring content, indicating multiple user-facing paths into job discovery.

requirements.text: The system shall support choosing a specific park to scope job discovery to a particular location.
requirements.rationale: Multiple screens show park selection as a central step, including a generic park chooser and a jobs page that becomes scoped to Six Flags White Water.

requirements.text: The system shall present available parks in a browsable location list that helps applicants find the correct property.
requirements.rationale: The open selector displays parks grouped by geography and park name, which grounds a requirement around location-based career discovery rather than a single widget label.

requirements.text: The system shall carry the selected park context into subsequent recruiting screens and park-specific job content.
requirements.rationale: After park selection, later screens reference Six Flags White Water and then show a White Water Atlanta lifeguard posting, indicating location context persists across the flow.

requirements.text: The system shall let applicants browse opportunities by department or team within a selected park.
requirements.rationale: The White Water page exposes team-oriented job areas such as lifeguards, food and beverage, park services, admissions, security, retail, and more opportunities.

requirements.text: The system shall highlight featured or currently hiring roles on park recruiting pages to speed job discovery.
requirements.rationale: The park page prominently promotes hiring content such as NOW HIRING LIFEGUARDS, category cards, and a mega hiring event, which suggests featured discovery support.

requirements.text: The system shall provide an individual detail page for a specific job opening.
requirements.rationale: The final screen is a dedicated role page for a Lifeguard position, showing that openings can be represented as standalone job-detail views.

requirements.text: The system shall present core metadata for each opening, including role title, job category, requisition identifier, employment type, location, and posting information.
requirements.rationale: The job detail page visibly includes structured opening information beyond the title, which supports a requirement around transparent job metadata.

requirements.text: The system shall present role responsibilities, qualification criteria, and compensation information to support application decisions.
requirements.rationale: The job page includes sections covering what the applicant will do, how they will do it, what they will need, and pay information, which directly grounds this requirement.

requirements.text: The system shall provide a prominent action for starting an application from recruiting content and job-opening pages.
requirements.rationale: Apply Now calls to action are visible on the park recruiting page and again on the detailed opening page, supporting application initiation from multiple points.

requirements.text: The system shall support an application workflow that can be launched for a specific opening after the applicant has identified the relevant park and role.
requirements.rationale: The visible flow shows park selection, role discovery, and apply-entry points, which strongly implies an end-to-end application path even though the submitted form itself is not shown.

requirements.text: The system shall communicate employment perks, benefits, or similar value propositions alongside job discovery content.
requirements.rationale: Several screens include perks and benefits messaging or benefit bullets, but full truth of those claims depends on policies beyond screenshot evidence.

requirements.text: The system shall provide an alternative discovery path for corporate or non-park-specific careers.
requirements.rationale: The careers pages include a distinct View Corporate Careers action, indicating that applicants are not limited to a single park-based path.

requirements.text: The system shall make the recruiting flow understandable through consistent labeling of park, team, and role context across screens.
requirements.rationale: The flow keeps reinforcing the White Water location and employment context through headings, labels, and team names, which supports a visible usability-oriented requirement.

requirements.text: The system shall support narrowing opportunities within a selected park through structured categories or similar organization rather than only a flat undifferentiated job list.
requirements.rationale: The visible team cards strongly suggest a structured approach to narrowing opportunities; extending that to broader within-park organization is a close, disciplined variant of what is shown.

requirements.text: The system shall surface recruiting campaigns or hiring events associated with a park's employment opportunities.
requirements.rationale: The White Water recruiting page includes a Mega Hiring Event promotion, which grounds a nearby but still visible recruiting-support capability.

requirements.text: The system shall keep the selected park context attached when an applicant proceeds from recruiting content into the application-start flow for a specific opening.
requirements.rationale:
Contrastive import from staged bundle
Intended label: partially_fulfilled
Mutation family: persistence_extension
Source gold requirement: REQ-04
Source gold text: The system shall carry the selected park context into subsequent recruiting screens and park-specific job content.
Generation rationale: This is a close continuation of the visible park-context carry-over requirement, but it extends persistence into the application-start stage, which is plausible yet may not be fully shown.
requirements.parent_harvest_text: The system shall carry the selected park context into subsequent recruiting screens and park-specific job content.

requirements.text: The system shall provide a visible handoff into the application process for the chosen role, such as a dedicated application page or explicit confirmation that the selected opening is being applied to.
requirements.rationale:
Contrastive import from staged bundle
Intended label: partially_fulfilled
Mutation family: external_effect_extension
Source gold requirement: REQ-10
Source gold text: The system shall provide a prominent action for starting an application from recruiting content and job-opening pages.
Generation rationale: This stays tightly anchored to the visible apply action, but extends it to a downstream application handoff outcome that often depends on pages beyond the captured recruiting flow.
requirements.parent_harvest_text: The system shall provide a prominent action for starting an application from recruiting content and job-opening pages.

requirements.text: The system shall let applicants drill into every visible department or team area on a selected park recruiting page to reach openings or recruiting details for that area.
requirements.rationale:
Contrastive import from staged bundle
Intended label: abstain
Mutation family: completeness_or_universal_quantifier
Source gold requirement: REQ-05
Source gold text: The system shall let applicants browse opportunities by department or specialized team within a selected park.
Generation rationale: This is a realistic strengthening of the department-browsing capability, but the universal claim over every visible area is harder to settle from a single executed path.
requirements.parent_harvest_text: The system shall let applicants browse opportunities by department or specialized team within a selected park.

requirements.text: The system shall mark roles as featured or hiring only when those openings are still actively accepting applications.
requirements.rationale:
Contrastive import from staged bundle
Intended label: abstain
Mutation family: hidden_state_extension
Source gold requirement: REQ-06
Source gold text: The system shall highlight featured or currently hiring roles on park recruiting pages to speed job discovery.
Generation rationale: This preserves the visible hiring-highlight concept but adds a backend-dependent truth condition about whether the opening is genuinely open for applications.
requirements.parent_harvest_text: The system shall highlight featured or currently hiring roles on park recruiting pages to speed job discovery.

requirements.text: The system shall provide a review step that summarizes the selected park and opening before the applicant commits to starting the application.
requirements.rationale:
Contrastive import from staged bundle
Intended label: not_fulfilled
Mutation family: missing_visible_step
Source gold requirement: REQ-11
Source gold text: The system shall support an application workflow that can be launched for a specific opening after the applicant has identified the relevant park and role.
Generation rationale: A review state is a plausible adjacent workflow phase before application launch, but it is not part of the accepted visible flow and would create useful contrast against direct apply-entry requirements.
requirements.parent_harvest_text: The system shall support an application workflow that can be launched for a specific opening after the applicant has identified the relevant park and role.

requirements.text: The system shall provide direct in-page filtering or refinement within a selected park's opportunities, such as narrowing visible openings by department, job type, or similar criteria instead of relying only on static category entry points.
requirements.rationale:
Contrastive import from staged bundle
Intended label: not_fulfilled
Mutation family: stronger_visible_constraint
Source gold requirement: REQ-15
Source gold text: The system shall support narrowing opportunities within a selected park through structured categories or similar organization rather than only a flat undifferentiated job list.
Generation rationale: This is a disciplined nearby strengthening of the existing organization requirement, shifting from static categorization toward richer visible refinement that many recruiting systems provide but may not appear here.
requirements.parent_harvest_text: The system shall support narrowing opportunities within a selected park through structured categories or similar organization rather than only a flat undifferentiated job list.
